titleStmt.title: SII 31.30: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 30. (A.R. No. B 282 of 1936.) VIPANAGANḌLA, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab built into the place formed under the margosa tree near the well called Bommanabhāvi.

Damaged and wornout. The Sanskrit portion of the inscription traces the genealogy of the Kākatīya kings upto Gaṇapati. The Telugu portion introduces a chief (name lost) who is endowed with a number of titles and records the grant of village (as an agrahāra) for the merit of his parents and his overlord on the occasion of solar-eclipse. The donee name is not mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[paṁktulu Arigi pōyanavi]
tāṁ yassaṁpadāṁ dātāsamyagvārddhi vighnaca
nityaṁ saukhyāyāstu vināyakaḥ . śrīkākatōkulamasti sa
lōkavikhyātaṁ payōmaya yōni nirmmalaṁ ya
tōttama vilasadguṇa ratnapūrṇaṁ rājapaṭalapprabhēda
vibhāti . prōlanāmā mahāraja ssatya gōrakṣaṇa
yata rasāraṇasēmmitpruṇī kṛtā . tasya putrō mahādē
vanāmadhēyō mahīpatiḥ . babhūva vikramōddaṁḍa rāyadi
ggajakēsarī tasmānmahadēvanrupālavaryyūjjātō janēḍyōga
ṇapatyadhīśaḥ yasmiṁndharā dhāraṇa dhuryya bāhē bhōgī bha
vatyēva bhujaṁgamēṁdraḥ . padbhyāṁ padmadyutīmapahāraṁnnāga
tōnūna nānādēśādhīśapprakaṭa makuṭa śrēṇī śōṇīkṛtā
bhyāṁ . sarvvā murvīmavati savitustulya tējā biḍaujā vā
ryaiśvaryyai rga.ṇapatī nripa kākatīyō mahāyānsvasti sa
madhigata paṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ paramamāhēśva
raṁ parahita carita vinayavibhūṣaṇa mūṟurāyajagada
ḷa calamertugaṁḍa Anumakoṁḍa puravarādhīśvara vīralakṣmī ni
jēśvaraṁ śrīsvayaṁbhudēvadivya śrīpādapadmārādhakulaina
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ kākatīya gaṇapatidēva mahā
rājulu Ōruṁgaṁṭi nelavīḍu lōna sukhasaṁkatā (dā) vinōdaṁ
laṁ pridhvirājyamu sēyucuṁḍagānu tatpādapadmōpajīvu
laina svastisamasta bhuvana vinuta vinaya vīravitaraṇa vikrama
pramukha nikhila guṇagaṇādhāra nijavīra paṁḍita janapālana parā
yaṇa gaṁdhahasti gaṁḍanārāyaṇa pāṁḍura tara yaśōbhi śō
bhita jagadaṁḍa maṁḍaḷika ghōḍerāya rāya jhaḍapa Āraṇimalla
Akarā maṁḍaḷikaragaṁḍa vicitra stōtraikapātra nijagōtra pavitrapara
nārīsahōdara rāyakōḷāhaḷa māḷavimalla malayamālya
ja parimala vasaṁta turagarēkhārēvaṁta vijayalakṣmīkāṁta
bahula bahu baṁdhu siṁdhu samri(mṛ)ddhivārddhi varddhana sudhākara
satyaratnākara śaraṇāgata vajrapaṁjara maṁḍaḷika jīvarakṣa

completly worn out
sūryyagrahaṇa nimitya
grāmamu tamataṁḍri
Agrahāramu gaṇapatidēva mahārāju
lakū gi dēvani
ṁnnataṁ gi dēvaraku tamatalli
kū puṇyamugānu dhārāpūrvvamusēsi A
ṣṭha bhōgatējassāmyamugānu sarvvanamasyamugā nicce
yō yācatērāma
. dānapālana yōrmmadhyē dānācchrēyānu pālanaṁ
dānā tsva pnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . svadattaṁ
paradatta vāyōharētī vasuṁdharāṁ sa(ṣa)ṣṭhi varṣa
sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatēkrimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 31.30 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
